hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; [[ "$f" =~ \.(ts|tsx)$ ]] || exit 0; npm run format && npm run lint; }
osascript -e 'display notification "Claude Code needs your attention" with title "Claude Code"'

hooks.prompt: Check if all tasks are complete. Respond ONLY with raw JSON, no markdown, no code fences. Use {"decision": "proceed"} if complete, or {"decision": "block", "reason": "what remains to be done"} if not.
